body.title: Fix SCOPE_GUARD HIGH inertia path — missing escalate call
body.result: Fixed SCOPE_GUARD HIGH inertia path: now calls _pe_escalate() to properly close goal + mark ticket blocked, preventing infinite chain re-firing. On HIGH+write/delete: escalate immediately instead of returning silently.
body.description: SCOPE_GUARD sets basket['pe_status']='escalated' but returns early without calling _pe_escalate(). Goal never closes. Chain re-fires infinitely. Fix: call _pe_escalate() on HIGH+write/delete, return early with escalate_reason set.
